forecast.name: This Afternoon
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers. Mostly cloudy. High near 58, with temperatures falling to around 56 in the afternoon. West wind around 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 5am. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 42. Northwest wind 3 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
